title: geonoma divisa
intro: Geonoma divisa, also known as the Golden Palm or Split Palm, is a species of palm tree that belongs to the Arecaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which can help to alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Geonoma divisa include treating fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of Geonoma divisa can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
